message:
feat(rref): add capability-based access via RRefAccessWitness

Introduce a capability witness pattern for RRef heap access. The
witness is obtained from RegionRecord::access_witness() when the region
is in a non-terminal state, proving the caller has been granted access.

Changes:
- RRefAccessWitness::new() is now pub(crate) to prevent external forging
- Add RRef::validate_witness() for region ownership checking
- Add RegionRecord::rref_get_with() and rref_with_witness() for
  witness-gated access (preferred path in capability-aware code)
- Extend RRefAccess trait with rref_get_with() and rref_with_witness()
- Re-export RRefAccessWitness from types::mod.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
